positive: A symmetrical, stylized celestial arrangement featuring mythical bioluminescent flora and abstract celestial bodies. Dominant subjects include glowing fractal fern fronds, stylized constellations mapped with iridescent dust, and interlocking geometric moons. The composition should be central, high-contrast, and highly intricate, resembling negative space engravings or detailed woodblock prints. Use a palette of deep sapphire blue, glowing teal, cosmic violet, and accents of stark electric gold. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau elegance and modern cosmic abstractism. The lighting must be dramatic and internal, emanating only from the glowing flora and stars, creating sharp silhouettes against a rich, gradient deep space background. Vector art quality, high detail, suitable for screen printing on fabric.
negative: blur, lowres, noisy, grainy, artifacts, smudges, text, watermark, logo, signature, dirty, poor anatomy, messy, abstract, copyright, trademark, simple, gradient fill
